subcodes.first_line: ...Your criterion should be to pursue your commercial activities with such fairness and equity as to be a cause of guidance to others
subcodes.first_line_orig: نیت باید چنین باشد که در این تجارت بقدری عادلانه و منصفانه رفتار شود
subcodes.subjects: @conduct in finance and business, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
